title: stachys officinalis var. hirta
intro: Stachys officinalis var. hirta, also known as upright witch or hairy betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stachys officinalis var. hirta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
